featureSections.title: Expert Plumbing Repairs & Installations
featureSections.body: From leaky faucets to burst pipes, our licensed plumbers handle it all. We use the latest technology to diagnose and fix issues fast, minimizing disruption to your home.

featureSections.title: Safe & Reliable Electrical Services
featureSections.body: Whether you need new wiring, outlet installation, or panel upgrades, our electricians ensure your home is safe and up to code. We handle everything from small fixes to full rewires.
featureSections.cardBody: Protect your home with a comprehensive electrical safety check. We identify hazards and recommend solutions.

servicesPage.intro: We offer comprehensive home services in Dallas, TX. From plumbing and electrical to AC repair and duct cleaning, our skilled technicians deliver quality workmanship and exceptional customer care.

services.title: Plumbing Services
services.shortDescription: Expert plumbing repairs, installations, and maintenance for your home.
services.longDescription: Our licensed plumbers handle everything from minor leaks to major repiping. We use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint issues quickly and provide lasting solutions. Services include water heater repair, drain cleaning, sewer line inspection, and fixture installation.
benefits: Fast response times – same-day service available
Upfront pricing with no hidden fees
All work backed by a satisfaction guarantee

process.title: Inspect & Diagnose
process.description: We thoroughly assess the issue using cameras and leak detectors to identify the root cause.

process.title: Provide Clear Estimate
process.description: You get a detailed, written estimate before any work begins. No surprises.

process.title: Repair & Follow-Up
process.description: We complete the repair efficiently and clean up. We follow up to ensure everything is working perfectly.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency plumbing services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency plumbing services. Call (469) 864-6982 anytime for urgent issues.

faqs.question: How much does a plumbing visit cost?
faqs.answer: We provide free estimates for most jobs. Our service fee is transparent and applied to any repair work.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable electrical solutions for your home or business.
services.longDescription: Our electricians handle all residential electrical needs, from outlet repairs to full panel upgrades. We prioritize safety and code compliance, ensuring your home’s electrical system is reliable and efficient.
benefits: Licensed electricians with years of experience
Modern solutions including smart home wiring
Clean, professional work with minimal disruption

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your electrical system and discuss your needs to recommend the best solution.

process.title: Plan & Quote
process.description: We provide a detailed plan and upfront quote. No hidden costs.

process.title: Install & Test
process.description: Our electricians complete the work safely and test everything to ensure proper function.

faqs.question: Can you install a new electrical panel?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install and upgrade electrical panels to meet modern demands and safety standards.

faqs.question: Do you offer outdoor lighting installation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We install landscape lighting, security lights, and more.

services.title: AC Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Keep your home comfortable with expert AC services.
services.longDescription: From routine maintenance to emergency repairs, our HVAC technicians ensure your air conditioning system runs efficiently. We service all major brands and offer installation for new systems.
benefits: Maintenance plans to extend system life

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: We inspect your AC unit, check refrigerant levels, and test components to identify the issue.

process.title: Explain Options
process.description: We explain the problem and your repair or replacement options with clear pricing.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We complete the repair and verify the system is cooling properly and efficiently.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend annual maintenance before summer to ensure efficiency and prevent breakdowns.

faqs.question: Do you install new AC units?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install a wide range of energy-efficient AC units. We can help you choose the right size for your home.

services.title: Vent & Duct Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Improve indoor air quality with professional duct cleaning.
services.longDescription: Our duct cleaning service removes dust, allergens, and debris from your HVAC system. This improves air quality, reduces allergies, and can lower energy bills. We use HEPA-filtered equipment for a thorough clean.
benefits: Leaves your home fresher and cleaner

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect your ductwork with cameras to assess cleanliness and identify any issues.

process.title: Agitation & Vacuum
process.description: We use rotary brushes and a powerful HEPA vacuum to dislodge and remove debris.

process.title: Sanitize & Seal
process.description: We apply an antimicrobial sanitizer and seal any leaks to improve efficiency.

faqs.question: How often should I have my ducts cleaned?
faqs.answer: Every 3-5 years is typical, but more often if you have pets, allergies, or recent renovations.

faqs.question: Does duct cleaning reduce energy bills?
faqs.answer: Yes, clean ducts allow your HVAC system to run more efficiently, potentially lowering energy costs.

about.headline: Your Trusted Home Service Partner in Dallas
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with fast, reliable, and fairly priced home services they can count on.
story: Highland Park Service Pros started with a simple mission: bring honesty and professionalism back to home services. Founded by a team of experienced tradesmen, we saw too many homeowners get overcharged or left with shoddy work. We built our company on transparency, quality, and respect for your home.

Today, we serve thousands of families across Dallas. Our team of licensed plumbers, electricians, and HVAC technicians undergoes continuous training to stay ahead of industry standards. Whether it's a leaking pipe or a dead AC, we treat every home like our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do the right thing, even when no one is watching. Honest advice, fair pricing.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work. Every job is done right the first time, using top-grade materials.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home with care. Clean work areas, clear communication, and punctuality.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Dallas and give back through local sponsorships and free safety inspections.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your home service needs.
